channel.title: Chinese Archaeology
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Chinese Archaeology

item.title: Paleolithic site of Xuetang Liangzi in Shiyan, Hubei
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0001

item.title: Sitai Neolithic site in Shangyi, Hebei
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0002

item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0003

item.title: Shang royal mausoleum area and its surroundings at Yinxu in Anyang, Henan
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0004

item.title: Bronze Age site at Hebosuo in Kunming, Yunnan
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0005

item.title: Xixia Suyukou porcelain kiln site in Helan, Ningxia
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0006

item.title: Dawenkou culture cemetery at the southern Gangshang site in Tengzhou, Shandong
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0007

item.title: The excavation of the Tang tombs of Dai Zhou and his wife in Chang’an District, Xi’an
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0008

item.title: The three grand cultural spheres of the Holocene Eurasian Continent
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0009

item.title: Preliminary discussions on painted pottery in Neolithic China
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0010

item.title: A comparative study on the jade drilling technology of ancient Mesoamerican civilizations and prehistoric China
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0011

item.title: Seima-Turbino-type bronze spearheads from Xiawanggang in Xichuan and the implications for north-south cultural exchange
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0012

item.title: “Export” of ninth- to tenth-century Chinese bronze mirrors: Shipwreck findings from the Java Sea
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0013

item.title: Biological evolutionary insights into the origins of agriculture: Evidence from the origin of rice agriculture
item.description: Article by Zhijun Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/char-2024-0014
